Uncluster

How To Use

Why Use Uncluster?

Built for developers who write HTML outside of a framework and want to move it into a modern stack without starting from scratch. Upload your file, pick an action, and download the result — no npm commands, no config files, no setup.

How To Use:

  1. Upload HTML: Click the "Upload" button and select your HTML file
  2. Choose Action: After upload, select from:
    • Format HTML: Re-indent and normalize your HTML structure
    • Export Zip: Extract inline CSS/JS into separate files and download external resources
    • Export TSX Project: Generate a complete Express + Vite + TypeScript project
    • Export EJS Project: Generate a complete Express + EJS server-rendered project
  3. Download Results: Your processed files will automatically download
  4. Finish: Click "Finish Operation" to reset and process another file
How It Works

Downloads

Download Settings

Use the save dialog to choose a location and edit the final name.

Leave a field blank to use the server default.
